summary: AgriDocs Phase 1 testing complete. All 23 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Documents page correctly shows 6 Philippine compliance categories, folder navigation, upload dialog with month selection for monthly types, QR phone upload with 15-min expiry tokens, and compliance summary. File uploads work with Cloudflare R2 storage.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend documents.py: All 6 categories defined with correct sub-categories and period_types (monthly, quarterly, annual, validity, one_time)
Backend: Agrivet category correctly marked audit_sensitive with BAI, FDA, FPA licenses
Backend: Coverage months correctly parsed as comma-separated integers and stored as array
Backend: QR upload tokens have 15-minute expiry with token_expires_at datetime comparison
Backend: Public endpoint /api/documents/qr-upload/{token} correctly accessible without auth
Backend: File uploads to R2 with key format {org_id}/business_documents/{doc_id}/{file_id}.ext
Backend: Pre-signed URLs generated for file access in GET /api/documents/{doc_id}
Backend: DELETE requires admin/manager role - correct permission check
Frontend DocumentsPage.js: All data-testid attributes present (documents-page, upload-btn, qr-upload-btn, cat-folder-*, subcat-folder-*, etc.)
Frontend: Upload dialog shows month selector only for monthly period_type documents
Frontend: QR dialog generates QR code via external API (api.qrserver.com)
Frontend: Breadcrumb navigation works correctly for category > sub-category drill-down
Frontend: Monthly grid shows 12 months with filed/missing status indicators
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test documents during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgriDocs Phase 1 fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/documents/* all working. Frontend page at /documents with folder navigation. Test documents were cleaned up. To test file preview, upload a real PDF/image document.

tests: Each category has label, icon, sub_categories
Employer compliance has SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG contributions
POST /api/documents with file attachment uploads to R2
Coverage months parsed correctly from comma-separated string
Files stored with r2_key in document record
GET /api/documents returns documents array with total
GET /api/documents/{id} returns document with pre-signed file URLs
PUT /api/documents/{id} updates metadata (name, tags, coverage_months, valid_until)
GET /api/documents/compliance/summary returns year, monthly_coverage, expiring_soon, expired
Year filter works for compliance summary

details: 6 category folder cards displayed (Business Registration, LGU Permits, BIR, Employer & Employee Compliance, Industry-Specific (Agrivet), Other)
Click category shows sub-category folders with period badges
Click sub-category shows monthly grid (for monthly types) + document list
Breadcrumb navigation works (All Documents > Category > Sub-category)
Upload dialog opens from Upload Document button
Sub-category dropdown appears after selecting category
Month selector appears for monthly period_type
Year selector, name, description, tags fields present
File drop zone with drag-and-drop support
QR dialog opens from Upload via Phone button
Generate QR button creates QR code
QR code displays category/sub-category labels and 15-min expiry notice
